name: functions
description: Tiny Bubbles v2 Firebase Cloud Functions — the ONLY raw-egress zone (scaffold at M1.0; w1 lands the real functions in M1.2, w2 the bloop proxy in M2.1).

scripts.test:emulator: echo 'NEEDS JAVA - run inside the emulator (see docs/RULES-REVIEW.md):' && echo '  firebase emulators:exec --project demo-tiny-bubbles "jest --config jest.emulator.config.js"'
